list.title: Deployments
list.description: See the last 10 deployments for this {type}
list.stuckBody: Hey! Looks like the build has been running for more than 10 minutes. Would you like to cancel this deployment?
list.webhookIntro: If you want to re-deploy this application use this URL in the config of your git provider or docker

killProcess.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to kill the process?

deleteDeployment.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this deployment? This action cannot be undone.

rollback.confirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to rollback to this deployment?
rollback.infoAlert: Please wait a few seconds while the image is pulled from the registry. Your application should be running shortly.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.detailIntro: See all the details of this deployment

cancelQueues.title: Are you sure to cancel the incoming deployments?
cancelQueues.description: This will cancel all the incoming deployments

clearDeployments.title: Are you sure you want to clear old deployments?
clearDeployments.description: This will delete all old deployment records and logs, keeping only the active deployment (the most recent successful one).

killBuild.title: Are you sure to kill the build?
killBuild.description: This will kill the build process

refreshToken.title: Are you absolutely sure?
refreshToken.description: This action cannot be undone. This will change the refresh token and other tokens will be invalidated.
